The illusory Apple consumer electronics OEM template in the original data has been physically completely incinerated. This enterprise, named 'Yunzhicheng Technology,' has a business license that is a standard 'encyclopedia of tech buzzwords': claiming to be able to 'produce multi-functional aerial vehicles, smart robots, drones and countermeasure equipment, IoT smart terminals.' However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated this extremely sci-fi disguise, capturing the most comical contrasting data of the entire batch: its paid-in capital is surprisingly only 10,700 RMB (ten thousand and seven hundred bucks)! And the entire company's insured headcount is only 1 person! The logical deduction instantly turned into a dark comedy: in a 3rd-floor single room of an office building in a development zone, this 'bare commander' boss, holding ten thousand bucks, claims to have built a 'super arsenal' capable of making drones, robots, and IoT terminals? Even more outrageously, the end of the license also states 'design and release advertising, interior decoration engineering construction.' The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing, production' delusions from the license, extracting what can truly be done with ten thousand RMB: 'agency sales and leasing of electronic products; computer software system integration (brokering and subcontracting); taking small decoration or electrical construction projects.' The truth is starkly naked: this is a 100% pure 1-Employee Tech Hardware Proxy & System Integration Shell (with extreme micro capital). The boss is an extremely typical 'take any job' middleman broker; registering this shell is purely to be able to issue invoices when taking on sporadic IT procurement, weak current cabling, or small decoration projects for enterprises and institutions. The official 'Electronic Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most outrageous demoting elevation of this grassroots micro service provider.
